programme.title: Skyscrapers and Car Parks
programme.desc: Join Bob on his next visit On Site! Follow Bob and the team as they take us through the construction of skyscrapers & car parks. Learn how skyscrapers are built up high on strong foundations and see how lifts are needed to carry people to the top.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: Mr Ellis has a batch of Doves delivered, to use in his magic act, and asks Bob to build a dovecote for his new birds to live in. Mr Ellis realises that he has to go to work but does not want to leave the birds at home alone.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: Bob is building a new swimming pool for the Mayor. He asks Muck to collect some special tiles from JJ, explaining that they are very fragile and easy to break.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: Bob is building a water feature in Mrs Potts’ garden, while Wendy and Scoop are demolishing a dry stone wall. Bob and the Machines are greatly amused by the statue Mrs Potts has chosen for her centrepiece.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: Now that Robert has taken over at the old yard, Wendy can finally move to Sunflower Valley! Bob is still in Bobsville, while the machines are in charge of setting up Wendy’s caravan, complete with solar panels, as a special surprise.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: It’s Mr and Mrs Bentley’s twenty fifth wedding anniversary and to celebrate Mr Bentley asks Bob and the gang to build a special summer house. Mrs Bentley is out for the day and the summer house is to be a surprise.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: Farmer Pickles is about to declare his Sunflower Oil business open, but there’s just one more job that he needs Bob to do. He needs a depot to store all the bottles of oil.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: Train enthusiast Mr Bentley is away for the day and, in his absence, Mrs Bentley decides to surprise her husband by asking Bob to build him a brand new model railway in the shed.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: Scoop has spent the night in Bobsville and is off back to Sunflower Valley early in the morning. Benny is desperate to go too so Scoop promises to come back and take him as soon as he can.

programme.title: Roads and Bridges
programme.desc: For the first time ever, Bob is going On Site! Join Bob and his Can-Do crew as they explore real life construction sites. See diggers, mixers and trucks work together to build roads and bridges.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: Bob has promised to put a cat flap in his kitchen door for Pilchard, but he gets an urgent call from Farmer Pickles who needs a fence built to keep the rabbits out of his lettuce field.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: Its early morning and there’s a strange creature in Sunflower Valley. First of all it visits the Homestead and then Scarecrow Cottage scaring Sumsy and Travis. It’s something big and hairy, but gets frightened away by Scrambler carrying Baz.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: Bob is rendering a wall for Mr Sabatini. The job is straightforward, but the finished result looks rather plain, so Bob offers to get some tiles from JJ’s yard to decorate it. While Bob is gone, Mr Sabatini demonstrates his soccer skills to Dizzy.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: Bob and crew are demolishing an old barn for Farmer Pickles, but as Lofty tests his demolition ball he accidentally damages one of the pillars at the entrance to Bob’s yard. Wendy offers to stay and repair this while Bob gets on with the day’s job.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: Bob’s built a new waterwheel for the old watermill. He’s made it at the yard, but now needs to dismantle it to take it to the mill in sections. Bob needs Benny, Scoop, Lofty and Muck to carry the wheel sections through the marshland to the mill.

programme.desc: This episode includes: Mexico Suicide, Campbell Kidnapping, Dr. Rapist, Update: Where's Kari, Dodge Heir and Real Monica.

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries with Dennis Farina
programme.desc: This episode includes: Skull Duggery, Lucky School, Deadly Doses + UD, Drug Playboy, Eleven Million Dollar Heist + UD and Fallen Star.

programme.title: Psychic Investigators: Lawrence Mbroh
programme.desc: Lawrence Mbroh was in a dangerous business - he sold drugs. So when he disappears, his father Alfred is worried. Detective Pam Gray is investigating the case but can find no new leads.

programme.title: Psychic Investigators: Rosa Talamantes
programme.desc: Can a psychic lead police to a body so they can convict a cold-blooded killer? Rosa Talamantes goes out for a drink with her boyfriend and never returns.

programme.title: Psychic Investigators: Forced Entry
programme.desc: Stacy Hendrickson is a college student living in Tempe Arizona. Away from home for the first time, she vanishes one night from her apartment.

programme.title: Psychic Investigators: Finding Amy
programme.desc: In Portland Maine, a young woman named Amy St. Laurent goes out one evening with friends. At a bar she meets a stranger named Jeff.

programme.title: Psychic Investigators: Decoy Dolly
programme.desc: Late one evening in suburban Louisiana, a young carpenter offers a lift home to a women he’s met in a bar. But after riding off with the stranger in his truck, Andre disappears into the night.

programme.title: Psychic Investigators: River Rat
programme.desc: An elderly widow is brutally murdered in her small town Louisiana home.

programme.title: Psychic Investigators: Home After Dark
programme.desc: Seventeen year-old Tyson Efird disappears from the parking lot of the grocery store where he works in Malvern, Arkansas.

programme.title: Psychic Investigators: A Taxing Death
programme.desc: After heading out for a routine day of appointments, Montana state auditor Walter Sullivan disappears. Nine days later, his body is found at the bottom of a cliff beside his mangled car.

programme.title: Psychic Investigators: The Ladykillers
programme.desc: Rose Swartwood, an elderly woman living alone in a New York project, is stabbed to death late one night in a frenzied attack. For the next two years the case remains unsolved.

programme.title: Sensing Murder: In Too Deep
programme.desc: In 1999, Kiwi engineer Aaron Hopa and his English colleague Robert Glazzard were murdered on board a survey ship in the Persian Gulf in.

programme.title: Sensing Murder: When The Trail Goes Cold
programme.desc: This episodes involves the disappearance of 62-year-old Kaye Stewart, a woman who went missing while on a short walk on June 13th, 2005.

programme.title: Sensing Murder: Fallen Angel
programme.desc: In this episode of Sensing Murder we learn about the murder of Angela Blackmoore, a 21 year old woman with a 2 year old child. The child was not harmed and the killer has not been found.

programme.title: Sensing Murder
programme.desc: “Sensing Murder” psychics are challenged to connect with the spirit of murdered Christchurch scrap-metal dealer, John Reynolds, to discover his killer and reveal the truth surrounding the violent attack.

programme.title: Sensing Murder: Out of the Dark
programme.desc: Described as a brutal execution, 46-year-old grandmother Chattrice Maihi-Carroll was found naked, stabbed to death in her New Zealand home in 2008. There were multiple suspects and everything seemed resolved following the arrest of a neighbour.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters
programme.desc: Despite mysterious and unnerving warnings from locals, the Ghost Hunters face their fears and stay on mission: to help people confront terrifying paranormal encounters that have shaken them to their core.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters
programme.desc: Despite mysterious and unnerving warnings from locals, the Ghost Hunters face their fears and stay on mission: to help people confront terrifying paranormal encounters that have shaken them to their core.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Darkness Falls
programme.desc: Ryan leads his team to one of the most haunted places in the US to confront their fears and solve a paranormal mystery. Aside from the alleged spirits of dead prisoners, something even darker may be lurking inside West Virginia State Penitentiary.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Dark Man
programme.desc: A grieving mother suspects her deceased son may have fallen victim to a mysterious entity called The Dark Man.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Family Ties
programme.desc: Jimmie is haunted by the apparition of a mysterious old woman who peers at him in the bathroom of his family's Petersburg, VA home.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Bedroom Eyes
programme.desc: PRS travels to rural Pennsylvania to investigate a haunting that began after a new couple moved into an old family farm.?Over the next three days, hidden tragedies are uncovered and latent psychic abilities are revealed.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Room & Board
programme.desc: The owners of a vacation lodge in the remote town of North Hudson, NY, feel their woodsy getaway is plagued by negative spirits.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Hell's Gate
programme.desc: Ever since Wes and his family moved into their new home in York, PA they've been struggling with a dark force that's made everyday a living hell. Wes feels his mental and physical health is in jeopardy.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Sixth Sense
programme.desc: A worried mother calls the Paranormal Research Society to help her son Matthew, a boy who sees dead people. Matthew's story strikes a chord with team leader Ryan Buell who also experienced paranormal activity as a child.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Supernatural Seduction
programme.desc: PRS investigates the Campbell House, where the Innkeeper and guests claim to have sexual encounters with a spirit who has deep ties to a family tragedy.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Good Vs. Evil
programme.desc: PRS visits a western Pennsylvania couple wracked by a torrent of paranormal activity.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Death Room
programme.desc: PRS arrives in Ryan's hometown to help the new owner of an old southern plantation unearth its dark history.?A painful family secret reveals a tale of greed and neglect, and the team must help free its unwilling victim from her spiritual prison.

programme.title: Most Haunted: Unseen: Dorchester Prison 2 P1
programme.desc: Said to be the Most Haunted prison in the UK, HMP Dorchester is a scary place to be with a group of people but alone it becomes terrifying. Karl investigates the upper cells and gets more than he bargained for.

programme.title: Most Haunted: Unseen: Dorchester Prison 2 P2
programme.desc: Stuart enters the underbelly of this remarkable building and starts to witness some very strange occurrences.

programme.title: Most Haunted: Unseen: Armely Mills Cottage
programme.desc: The cottage on the site of Armley Mills is said to be full of paranormal activity so Karl decides to enter, alone and witnesses something that is eager to grab his attention.

programme.title: Most Haunted: Unseen: Shrewsbury Prison
programme.desc: Abandoned prisons are always a daunting prospect and the Most Haunted team love them. This time Karl takes on HMP Shrewsbury alone and experiences some of the unhappy phantoms that lurk in the shadows.

programme.title: Most Haunted: Unseen: Samlesbury Hall P1
programme.desc: With a history dating back to 1185, Salmesbury Hall is of the UK’s most historic buildings and said to be one of the most haunted. With ghost stories and sightings all over the building, Stuart investigates the ground floor.

programme.title: Most Haunted: Unseen: Samlesbury Hall P2
programme.desc: Karl investigates the upper floors of this historic building dating back to 1185, and realises he is not alone.

programme.title: Most Haunted: Unseen: Gressenhall Workhouse Pt1
programme.desc: Karl investigates the very haunted school room in the large imposing Gressenhall Workhouse. The activity starts even before Karl gets into the building and becomes one of the most impressive investigations to date.

programme.title: Beyond Belief: Fact or Fiction

programme.title: Beyond Belief: Fact or Fiction: Episode 7

programme.title: Beyond Belief: Fact or Fiction: Episode 8

programme.title: Don't Say A Word
programme.desc: When Dr. Nathan Conrad's daughter is kidnapped, a secret held by one of his catatonic patients may be his only hope.

programme.title: Push
programme.desc: Superhumans defy a government plot to harness and abuse their powers. Chris Evans and Dakota Fanning (the TWILIGHT films) team in a pulse-pounding paranormal thriller.

programme.title: Bedazzled
programme.desc: Elliot Richards is a hapless young man consumed by unrequited love, and desperate to change his life, he makes a deal with the devil who slyly promises to do just that — for a price.

programme.title: Olympic Dreams
programme.desc: In this heart-warming romantic comedy, an athlete and volunteer form an unexpected bond at the Olympic Games.

programme.title: Peeples
programme.desc: Sparks - and laughs - fly when Wade Walker (Craig Robinson) crashes the Peeples' annual family reunion in the Hamptons to ask for their daughter's (Kerry Washington) hand in marriage.

programme.title: How To Be A Latin Lover
programme.desc: Eugenio Derbez (INSTRUCTIONS NOT INCLUDED) and Salma Hayek head an all-star cast in this hilarious comedy about an aging ladies’ man who learns that love and trust must be earned.

programme.title: Invasion of the Body Snatchers
programme.desc: People accuse their loved ones of being emotionless impostors. At first, Dr. Bennell tries to convince them they’re wrong, but they’re not. Plant-like extraterrestrials have invaded Earth, taking possession of their souls while they sleep.

programme.title: Invasion of the Body Snatchers
programme.desc: People accuse their loved ones of being emotionless impostors. At first, Dr. Bennell tries to convince them they’re wrong, but they’re not. Plant-like extraterrestrials have invaded Earth, taking possession of their souls while they sleep.

programme.title: Jabberwocky
programme.desc: A young peasant, with no interest in adventure or fortune, is mistaken as the kingdom's only hope when a horrible monster threatens the countryside.

programme.title: The Marshal of Madrid
programme.desc: A series of murders leads to a border smuggling ring run by an oil magnate (James Gregory).

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: The townsfolk of North Fork decide to give a young couple a shivaree celebration. When the drunken crowd gets out of hand and roughs up the bride-to-be, the young groom challenges them.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: When a young boy from Brooklyn is accused of murder, Mark, believing the boy's claim of innocence, hides him until he can find the real killer.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: U.S. Marshal Sam Buckhart arrives in North Fork in search of renegade Indians suspected of the brutal killing of a Texas Ranger and his family.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Sid Fallon tries to blackmail former gambler Julia Andueza into allowing him to use her boarding house as a gambling hall and saloon.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas puts his life in jeopardy when he agrees to testify in a murder case where the first witness was killed before he could testify, and the killer is still at large.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Outlaw Sam Morley falls in love with a young woman who has a serious illness and asks Lucas to turn him in for the reward and use the money to pay for her medical care.

programme.title: Close range
programme.desc: A rogue soldier turned outlaw is thrust into a relentless fight with a corrupt sheriff.

programme.title: Jack Hunter: And The Quest For Akhenatens Tomb
programme.desc: Jack Hunter is abducted blindfolded to a Turkish US base to be recruited by the NSA, told his mentor was killed because Albert Littmann's Russian mob employer Doridanov want the ancient Osiris-weapon.

programme.title: Smokey Bites The Dust
programme.desc: This movie follows the rivalry between a small-town southern sheriff and a small-town teenaged thief who steals cars and destroys them with the sheriff's daughter by his side.

programme.title: Stolen
programme.desc: A former thief frantically searches for his missing daughter, who has been kidnapped and locked in the trunk of a taxi. Starring Nicolas Cage and Malin Akerman.

programme.title: Copycat
programme.desc: Holly Hunter is an ambitious cop who tries to draw the forensic psychologist out of her self-imposed exile to help catch a murderer who is copying work of other serial killers.

programme.title: American Exit
programme.desc: A dying father takes a road trip with his son, to try to rebuild his relationship before he dies.

programme.title: Captive Hearts
programme.desc: A finance executive is mysteriously kidnapped and when the hostage takers send video demands directly to the man’s wife, a lone police officer, Detective Kelsoe, has his suspicions.

programme.title: The Encounter
programme.desc: When Collin is discovered naked, disoriented and alone in the forest, he struggles to recount the events of the previous night. His memories return in a series of horrific flashes of what became of his friends and fiancée.

programme.title: Missile To The Moon
programme.desc: Escaped cons stowaway on a flight to the moon and discover alien women ruled by a sadistic queen. In Vibrant Color!

programme.title: Metropolis
programme.desc: In a futuristic city sharply divided between the working class and the city planners, the son of the city's mastermind falls in love with a working class prophet who predicts the coming of a savior to mediate their differences.

programme.title: A Horse For Alex
programme.desc: A Horse For Alex tells the moving story of Alex, a teenage bully who spends her time lashing out at classmates. When she is persuaded to attend a summer camp with her friends she expects the worst but the more time she spends with the beautiful horses...

programme.title: Joe Somebody
programme.desc: Tim Allen is Joe, a guy whose life has been steadily changing for the worse. When the office bully goes too far, Joe decides it's time to turn himself from a nobody into a somebody.

programme.title: My Dog The Space Traveller
programme.desc: When a boy loses his dog in his backyard he finds it’s gone through a portal which leads to another dimension of our universe. He must rely on his friends and family to get his dog back before the portal closes.

programme.title: Secrets In The Ice: The Vanishing Of Flight CS-59
programme.desc: A secret underground military research station in the middle of the Greenland Ice Sheet is revealed as one of the most elaborate cover stories in the history of the Cold War.

programme.title: Secrets In The Ice: Curse Of The Ice Princess
programme.desc: Merging advanced scanning technology and scientific research, this series investigates curiosities that have been lost for millennia, or never seen before, exploring how and why they ended up in the most desolate and distant corners of the planet.

programme.title: Encounter: UFO: Visitations
programme.desc: Sometimes, the mysterious unidentified objects people see in the sky touch down and leave physical evidence behind.

programme.title: Encounter: UFO: Physical Contact
programme.desc: These are the witnesses that have been literally touched by the unknown. Do these cases hold the answer to the central question of UFOlogy?

programme.title: Encounter: UFO: Hot Spots
programme.desc: They keep coming back. There are areas around the world that seem to keep attracting UFOs, where objects return to the skies again and again, as if taunting witnesses below.

programme.title: Encounter: UFO: Close Encounters
programme.desc: There is no safe place. Every day, all around the world, in the most ordinary places, regular people are spotting UFOs.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: The team is joined by a new CSI, Michael Keppler, who assists them on a case.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: A shocking event during an arrest leads the CSIs to a series of bizarre deaths.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: The discovery of a body in a dumpster leads the CSIs to a powerful drug lord.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: A double fatality at a Korea Town party has the CSIs on the hunt for a missing boy.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: The killing of a teen singing sensation leads the CSIs to re-examine a 1950s murder case.

programme.title: Scorpion: Wreck The Halls
programme.desc: It's Christmas Eve and Team Scorpion's electronics-free mountain getaway turns deadly when they come across gun-runners, and Ralph is kidnapped when they try to escape.

programme.title: Scorpion: Ice Ca-Cabes
programme.desc: When a mission in the desert results in exploding shrapnel that seriously wounds Cabe, Team Scorpion must freeze his body in order to save his life.

programme.title: Scorpion: Faux Money Maux Problems
programme.desc: When Team Scorpion is duped into producing counterfeit money for a foreign entity intent on ruining the U.S. economy, Paige must rely on her mother Veronica's skills as a grifter to save them.

programme.title: Scorpion: The Hole Truth
programme.desc: Team Scorpion must save a man teetering on the edge of a massive sink hole that threatens to destroy the Los Angeles water supply forever.

programme.title: Scorpion: Sharknerdo
programme.desc: Team Scorpion's job to find sunken treasure goes awry when Walter and Paige's boat explodes, leaving them lost in the middle of the Pacific Ocean surrounded by sharks.

programme.title: Rookie Blue: You Can See the Stars
programme.desc: In the wake of a targeted attack on the officers of 15 Division (ep. 412), Andy, Swarek, and their fellow officers have to piece together the truth about a past crime in order to find Oliver Shaw – in time to save his life

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Blink
programme.desc: In the aftermath of the night’s traumatic events, Andy and Dov try to pull themselves together at an all-night diner, but are caught off-duty and off-guard in a volatile diner hold-up.

programme.title: Rookie Blue: All by Her Selfie
programme.desc: Oliver gets promoted and Andy is tasked with training 15 Division’s newest rookie, Duncan Moore. But when Andy and Duncan respond to a messy homicide at a pawnshop, it’s clear this rookie is going to give Andy the challenge of a lifetime.

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Heart Breakers, Money Makers
programme.desc: When Andy and Nick’s seizure at an illegal gambling house leads to a suspicious confession, Andy recruits Sam to help figure out who’s lying, why, and where the money is, before anyone gets hurt.

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Wanting
programme.desc: When a tenement-building shooting leads to the discovery of an executed gang leader, 15 Division must race to find the killer before a gang war breaks out

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Going Under
programme.desc: When 15 Division goes undercover at a club-land bar that’s a possible hub for illegal handguns, Chris’s erratic behavior and concern for a specific drug dealer make Dov suspicious.

programme.title: Sleepless
programme.desc: Don't judge a cop by his cover. Rescue. Revenge. Redemption. To get justice, sometimes you have to get brutal.

programme.title: The Forbidden Kingdom
programme.desc: A discovery made by a kung fu obsessed American teen sends him on an adventure to China, where he joins up with a band of martial arts warriors in order to free the imprisoned Monkey King.

programme.title: Crossworlds
programme.desc: A magic crystal leads a college student (Josh Charles) and an adventurer (Rutger Hauer) on a surreal quest to save the world.

programme.title: Don't Ever Leave Me
programme.desc: Jack's grandfather Harry comes out of prison and stays with him in his mews flat.

programme.title: House of Secrets
programme.desc: The Paris Police recruit the officer of an English ship to help trap counterfeiters by joining them.

programme.title: The Birthday Present
programme.desc: A British executive lands in prison after trying to smuggle a watch across the German border.

programme.title: Went the Day Well?
programme.desc: A small English village is so cut off that the arrival of a car is an event. When lorryloads of Royal Engineers led by Major Ortler turn up, the villagers have no reason to suspect that they are really disguised German paratroopers.

programme.title: JAG: To Walk on Wings
programme.desc: Congresswoman Latham and a colleague watch four marine jumpers jump into the ocean from an M22 Osprey. With two marines left to jump, the plane is struck by a swell in the ocean. Harm and Mac are instructed to investigate.

programme.title: JAG: Guilt
programme.desc: When Captain Huddleston hears that the marine corporal has been charged with rape, he sends Lt. Colonel Sarah Mac MacKenzie to handle the case in a hot zone of Anti-American activity.

programme.title: JAG: Mixed Messages
programme.desc: An intruder shoots three Navy people, killing two. One of the dead is a friend of Harm, who protects his reputation. Webb, counter-espionage, and disinformation are involved; Bud solves it. Mac and Renee return to town; Mac leaves again.

programme.title: JAG: Ambush
programme.desc: Capt. Shepard leads his troop off its peacekeeping mission and into battle with the colonel of the rebel forces. Consequently, six marines die in the public incident. Harm is sent in to investigate despite a recent touch of bad luck in a string of trials.

programme.title: JAG: Jag-a-thon
programme.desc: The JAG gang takes part in a JAGathon, a charity-benefit marathon, which provides opportunities for personal pride and individual competitiveness. Sturgis feels uncertain, and Harm defends a sailor for impersonating an officer.

programme.title: JAG: The Mission
programme.desc: A spotter on the ground calls for an airstrike as he has identified 15 heavily armed suspected Al Qaeda members on horseback. JAG won’t approve the airstrike until the spotter is absolutely certain the men are Al Qaeda members.

programme.title: Flashpoint
programme.desc: When a former SRU veteran shows up at headquarters and locks himself in a safe room with the intent to commit suicide, Ed is called to the scene and attempts to talk his former teacher out of ending his life.

programme.title: Flashpoint
programme.desc: A past mission comes back to haunt Ed when he discovers that a sniper who has taken over City Hall is the son of a man that he killed on a previous mission

programme.title: Flashpoint
programme.desc: When three men take the CEO of a mortgage company hostage, the SRU team is called to the scene to diffuse the situation.

programme.title: Flashpoint
programme.desc: When the SRU is called to the scene of an upper class household where four hostages are being held, they discover that the hostage taker is actually the boyfriend of the family's nanny.

programme.title: Flashpoint
programme.desc: The SRU must decide how to respond against a colleague after discovering a federal agent they're working with during the transport of a serial killer is sabotaging their mission.

programme.title: Flashpoint
programme.desc: When a young man learns that his best friend's family is moving away due to financial problems, he decides to rob a local food store to get money

programme.title: Legendary
programme.desc: Cal Chetley is a bright, engaging, undersized fifteen year-old who's been picked on most of his life. Cal joins his high school wrestling team in the hopes his brother will train him. More importantly, Cal uses wrestling as the tool to reunite his family.

programme.title: Magic Beyond Words
programme.desc: An inspiring look at JK Rowling's rise to become one of the most influential writers-from her humble beginnings, as an imaginative young girl and awkward teenager, to the loss of her mother and the genesis of the Harry Potter phenomenon.

programme.title: Miss Virginia
programme.desc: An inspiring, heart-warming and relevant true story, starring Uzo Aduba (Orange is the New Black).

programme.title: A Warm December
programme.desc: An African-American doctor falls in love with the niece of an African ambassador during his vacation in London, but it turns out that she is suffering from a rare terminal illness.

programme.title: Tales from the Cryptkeeper: Gone Fishin' / A Little Body of Work
programme.desc: Young Randy is reluctant to accompany his Uncle Ned on a fishing trip. / Delinquents Eddie and Herman have a bad habit of stealing parts for their hot rod from cars on the street.

programme.title: Tales from the Cryptkeeper: The Sleeping Beauty
programme.desc: Self-centered and conceited Prince Charming has only two goals in life: to look maahvelous, daaahling, and to reach the castle of Sleeping Beauty in order to kiss her out of her spell.

programme.title: Tales from the Cryptkeeper: The Works In Wax
programme.desc: Craig and William are just about the only two people left who care about Rottmucker's Wax Museum and its collection of classic monsters.

programme.title: Tales from the Cryptkeeper: The Works In Wax
programme.desc: Craig and William are just about the only two people left who care about Rottmucker's Wax Museum and its collection of classic monsters.

programme.title: Tales from the Cryptkeeper: Cave Man

programme.desc: Best friends Camille and Mildred are obsessed with monsters and vampires.

programme.title: Tales from the Cryptkeeper: Ghost Ship
programme.desc: Radical surf dudes Mike and Ben decide to take Ben's father's most bodacious speedboat for a spin - without permission.

programme.desc: Vera Miles guest stars as a wife who fakes evidence appearing to link two murders, in an attempt to trick McGarrett into reinvestigating the homicide charge for which her husband was convicted.

programme.desc: MacGyver is the Thorntons only hope when they are taken hostage in the swamps of Louisiana by an ex-agent seeking revenge.

programme.title: Taxi

programme.title: Taxi

programme.title: Taxi

programme.title: The Exes
programme.desc: Haskell dates a beautiful woman who Phil is convinced is really a man. Stuart is filled with guilt after he sleeps with a woman who thinks he’s a war hero.

programme.title: The Exes
programme.desc: Holly sneaks into a sorority Eden is pledging to find out why she was rejected years ago. Haskell turns the guys' apartment into a pretend AirBnB to attract a woman.

programme.title: 48 Hours: A Bad Bet

programme.title: 48 Hours: Missing Molly
programme.desc: A report on the unsolved abduction and murder of 16-year-old Molly Bish. Bish disappeared in June 2000 from the local swimming hole. In May 2003, Tim McGuigan, a former police officer, helped discover evidence that lead to the discovery of Molly’s body.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Deadly Ride
programme.desc: Jane Mixer, a student at the University of Michigan Law School in March of 1969, had just agreed to get married and had arranged a ride home to tell her parents. Her body was found in a small, rural cemetery just miles from her dorm.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Chamber of Secrets
programme.desc: In her divorce case, Frieda Hanimov feared that she would lose custody of her children because she suspected that the judge ruling on her case was corrupt. She went to authorities with her suspicions, Hanimov agreed to go undercover and, wearing a wire.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Murder They Wrote: The End of the Dream
programme.desc: A report on the charismatic Scott Scurlock, known as “Hollywood” because of his flamboyant style and effective use of disguises in the commission of crimes, successfully eluded capture for four years while effortlessly robbing 18 banks.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: The Rebel
programme.desc: Phelps poses as an archeology professor and Dana as one of his graduate students, as the IMF goes to the aid of a group of young guerilla fighters in an effort to obtain from them a notebook containing vital scientific information in "The Rebel"

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: The Killer
programme.desc: Robert Conrad guest stars as a professional assassin whom the Impossible Missions Force must prevent from Carrying out his assignment without knowing the identity of his target in "The Killer" segment of Paramount Television's "Mission: Impossible."

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: Flip Side
programme.desc: Sal Mineo guest stars as a ruthless young operator who heads up an international narcotics ring which the IMF attempts to break up on Paramount Television's "Mission: Impossible."

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: My Friend, My Enemy
programme.desc: Special-guest star Jill Haworth portrays a glamorous double agent, who uses her feminine wiles on Paris to set him up for an enemy plot on Paramount Television's "Mission: Impossible" series.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: The Innocent
programme.desc: Christopher Connelly guest stars as a non-cooperative young computer genius who has "dropped out" of society, but is desperately needed by the IMF to complete their assignment on Paramount Television's "Mission: Impossible."

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Blazing Saddles
programme.desc: Ton and Allen head to a Hollywood auction and face a new competitor with a seemingly endless cash flow. After they uncover a triple barrel shotgun and an antique camel saddle, Allen confronts an old childhood fear.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Without a Chute
programme.desc: After a tough auction, things get worse when the shop's landlord wants to talk to the guys. Ton tries to negotiate with him while Allen has to put an experimental powered parachute to the test to save the day's profits.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Cashville, Tennessee
programme.desc: Ton and Allen hit the road for Nashville, where they rumble with a band of tough, high-bidding bikers. The day explodes when the guys discover a 37 millimeter anti-tank gun and a cowboy's rodeo saddle.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Carolyn Goes Topless
programme.desc: A friendly competition with former employee Carolyn turns into a vicious battle for a 1968 Corvette Stingray, giving Carolyn the last laugh. Allen tests his Ninja skills with an antique sickle weapon.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Little-Ton Jones
programme.desc: Allen & Ton try to get the inside scoop on their competition by chatting up local auction buyers. The guys find some heavy gold-mining machinery from the 1950s & an amateur rocket that can travel faster than the speed of sound!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Win Lose or Joust
programme.desc: Ton and Allen race back from an auction to purchase a rare comic valued at over $100,000. The guys uncover a Samurai sword used for ritual suicide and Allen lives out his childhood fantasy of becoming knight.

programme.desc: Ton and Allen get taken down by their fiercest opponent, CJ, but a twist of fate keeps the guys in the game. They uncover a Geiger counter and NASCAR impact wrenches, while their accountant delivers some shocking news.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Animal Instincts

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Don't Taze Me Bro

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Ton-Geons & Dragons
programme.desc: While Ton soups up their new truck, Allen heads to an auction solo and encounters Carolyn and CJ. There he discovers LARP weaponry, a sword collection, and falconry gear, before Ton reveals their new ride: Betty.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Voodoo Moola

programme.title: Wildest Indochina: Malaysia: Freaks of Nature

programme.title: Mork & Mindy: Mork Meets Robin Williams

programme.title: Mork & Mindy: Mindy, Mindy, Mindy
programme.desc: Mork, lonely in Mindy's absence, sets the stage for amazing comical confusion when he gets the visiting Orkan Elder to clone multiple Mindys which he continues to do until he gets it right.

programme.title: Mork & Mindy: Mork The Swinging Single
programme.desc: Mindy is convinced that she has unleashed the swingingest single ever after she persuades Mork that it would inprove their relationship if each began dating new people and he turns into the hilarious new king of Boulder's social scene.

programme.title: Mork & Mindy: Mork and The Family Reunion
programme.desc: When Mindy eats one of Mork's gourmet delights, she turns into a wacky Orkan herself, sending her family reunion into a rollicking tizzy and treating pompous old Uncle Dave (special guest star Jonathan Winters) to a bizarre evening he won't forget.

programme.title: Mork & Mindy: I Heard It Through The Morkvine
programme.desc: Mork, who doesn't understand why people gossip, reveals some hilarious inside scoops when he shows and tells all about his friends while subbing for Mindy as host of a local TV show called Rumor Has It.

programme.title: Mork & Mindy: Mindy and Mork
programme.desc: When Mindy has to work long hours on a new TV call-in show, Mork has to help with the housework. But when his comedic cleaning efforts turn the apartment into a disaster area, he calls up Mindy, on the air, for a new set of instructions.

programme.title: Mork & Mindy: Regrets and Reflections
programme.desc: Mr. Bickley's 50th birthday celebration turns into a crazy exchange of everybody's deepest secrets, but Mindy waits until the group leaves to tell Mork somthing she's wanted to say for years.

programme.title: Mork & Mindy: The Wedding
programme.desc: Mindy is the beautiful bride and Mork is the outrageously funny groom - who may not be able to fit into his tuxedo if he can't convince Orson to approve the marriage and undo his transformation of Mork into an English sheep dog.

programme.title: Mork & Mindy: Three The Hard Way
programme.desc: Mork and unsuspecting Mindy hatch a comedy plot that's bigger than both of them when an egg emerges from Mork's navel that grows and grows until it bursts open and out pops their full-grown, middle-aged-looking son.

programme.title: Myth Hunters
programme.desc: In 1944 Italy, SS soldiers raid an Italian Count's villa under Himmler's orders to find the Germania, an ancient manuscript by Tacitus. Himmler idealized it as the "Book of Power" to prove Aryan superiority, justifying Nazi atrocities.

programme.title: Myth Hunters
programme.desc: Ron Wyatt, a Nashville nurse turned amateur archaeologist at 47, aimed to validate Bible stories. In 1977, he claimed finding Noah’s Ark on Mount Ararat and later dived for Egyptian chariot remains, supporting Moses’ Red Sea crossing.

programme.title: Myth Hunters
programme.desc: In 1924, a girl found a quartz crystal skull in Central America, believing it had telepathic powers. Legend says thirteen such skulls will unlock life’s mysteries. Modern science has debunked their authenticity, despite some being in museums.

programme.title: Myth Hunters
programme.desc: Historian Michael Hesemann sought to authenticate the Titulus Crucis, believed to be a piece of Christ's cross. Displayed in a Rome church, it spans from Jerusalem to modern Rome, backed by records since the 1400s.

programme.title: Myth Hunters
programme.desc: Famed archaeologist Ralegh Radford stares into an empty pit; has he found the final resting place of King Arthur, the wielder of Excalibur, the founder of Camelot and the Lord of the Round Table?

programme.title: Murder Maps: Terror In The Roaring Twenties
programme.desc: Edith Thompson and Frederick Bywaters were in love. But the young couple were convicted for murdering her husband in a case that shocked society and fascinated Alfred Hitchcoc

programme.title: Murder Maps: The Blackout Ripper
programme.desc: It was WWII and London was rocked by the Blitz from the planes flying above. But down on the streets below another terrible danger lurked in the shadows. A serial killer was on the loose.

programme.title: Museum Secrets: Inside the Uffizi Gallery, Florence
programme.desc: From a famous artist who vanished to a traitorous Nazi who saved the day, discover the secrets inside the Uffizi Gallery.

programme.title: Museum Secrets: Inside the State Historical Museum, Moscow
programme.desc: From the duel that killed a genius to Lenin’s Rolls-Royce, discover the secrets inside the State Historical Museum.

programme.title: Museum Secrets: Inside the Smithsonian Institution, Washington DC
programme.desc: From the Zeros that bombed Pearl Harbor to the rocket that could take humans to Mars, discover the secrets inside the Smithsonian Institution.

programme.title: Museum Secrets: Inside the Chateau of Versailles, Paris
programme.desc: From the schemes of Marie Antoinette to the spectrum of a star that reveals the origin of human life, discover the secrets inside the Chateau of Versailles.

programme.title: Bang Goes The Theory
programme.desc: A demo of calorific value by taking part in the Oxbridge Boat Race; testing MP's abilities to calculate risk.

programme.title: Bang Goes The Theory
programme.desc: Liz investigates sunburns; making museum visitors act younger and smarter.

programme.title: Destruction Decoded: HURRICANES
programme.desc: Hurricanes, Typhoons and Cyclones all the same thing with different names – what they also have in common is their destructive power! Hurricanes are large, swirling storms and winds from a hurricane can damage buildings or trees.

programme.title: Destruction Decoded: MEGAFLOODS
programme.desc: Water covers two thirds of the earth’s surface, and we are utterly dependent on it, but when this vital ingredient of life unleashes its fury on the planet it becomes the ultimate bringer of death.

programme.title: Destruction Decoded: CONSTRUCTION
programme.desc: Bridges and tunnels have transformed the way we live, making the inaccessible easy to reach, and turning time consuming journeys into convenient commutes, but when things go wrong they can go very wrong indeed.

programme.title: Destruction Decoded: TORNADO
programme.desc: A tornado is a violently rotating column of air extending from the base of a thunderstorm down to the ground. Tornadoes are capable of completely destroying well-made structures, uprooting trees, and hurling objects through the air like deadly missiles.

programme.title: The New Frontier: Slingshot
programme.desc: Sending probes throughout the solar system is a mathematicians dream and an engineers nightmare, sling shotting probes around other planets to arrive at their destination.

programme.title: The New Frontier: Tickets Please
programme.desc: No spacecraft have traveled so fast or so close to a star before. It is hoped to reveal the source of the solar winds that effect us here on Earth

programme.title: The New Frontier: Exo Planeta
programme.desc: As scientists and astronomers peer closer at nearby stars with ever more fidelity they are discovering planets; exo planets, worlds outside our own solar system.

programme.title: The New Frontier: The Planet Makers
programme.desc: From the beginnings of our Solar System four and half billion years ago there remains tantalizing clues to its evolution; remnent debris: asteroids and comets.

programme.title: The New Frontier: Edge of The Universe
programme.desc: The night sky is a time machine. The further we look out into the universe the further back in time we reach.

programme.title: The New Frontier: The Ice Giants
programme.desc: Beyond the asteroid belt lay the ice giants, some can be seen with the naked eye, others only glimpsed once by a passing probe.

programme.title: The New Frontier: The Moons of Olympis
programme.desc: These are the the Moon's of the gas giants. Each a unique and mysterious world of its own. Some have oceans of water, geysers of Sulphur or atmospheres of plastic.

programme.title: The New Frontier: Mars: Adapt Or Leave
programme.desc: As the latest successes and failures come and go Mars continues to give up her secrets.

programme.title: The New Frontier: Interface
programme.desc: The Ionisphere, where the Earth interfaces with space, is little understood, it effects radio communications, GPS signals and satellites alike.

programme.title: Wild Asia: At The Edge
programme.desc: A rich portrait of life and death at the vertical limit of mammalian life on Earth — the Himalayas — including the most intimate and extensive encounters with a wild snow leopard ever captured on film.

programme.title: Wildest Europe
programme.desc: From mountain to sea, and from scorching desert to Arctic tundra, Europe’s great wilderness contains a stunning and surprising explosion of life. Wildest Europe reveals the incredible beauty and diversity of wildlife in Europe’s major natural habitats.

programme.title: Wild Germany: Rivers and Lakes
programme.desc: Water is the beginning of all life - including the wildlife of Germany. The episode Rivers and Lakes takes the viewer on a journey through the water world of Wild Germany.

programme.title: Wild Asia: A Forest All Seasons

programme.desc: When the duck guys have to pull an all-nighter to finish some work, Willie decides he wants to join them. But when a dying smoke detector distracts them from their work, Jase and Willie head off to disarm it.

programme.title: Battlefront: WWII Road To Victory: Fall of the Philippines

programme.title: Battlefront: WWII Road To Victory: Battle of Dieppe
programme.desc: The Allies launch an ill-fated attack on the German-occupied port of Dieppe, France.

programme.title: Battlefront: WWII Road To Victory: Battle of Stalingrad

programme.title: Battlefront: WWII Road To Victory: North Africa (November 1942)

programme.title: Battlefront: WWII Road To Victory: Burma: The Forgotten Front (Spring 1943)
programme.desc: The Japanese meet resistance from British forces as they advance through Burma to take India in 1944.

programme.desc: Fans of popular YouTube star Andrea Russett call on Nev and Max to help catch a potential stalker who is impersonating Andrea's family online. What the guys uncover will shock even them. (S5, ep17)

programme.desc: For years, Nicole has had her pictures stolen to make fake profiles, one of which has been catfishing Ryan for ten years. Ryan and Nicole are unsure whether it's a random troll, or they have a common enemy.

programme.desc: Gary reluctantly asks Amber for help with Leah when Kristina has a family emergency. Maci gets to know Ryan's new girlfriend better, while Catelynn and Tyler discover they're still not ready to move into their new home.

programme.title: Architects Of Darkness: Hermann Goering
programme.desc: Hermann Goering: Hermann Goering was the commander-in-chief of the Luftwaffe and Hitler's designated successor. This is his dark story.

programme.title: The Abyss: Rise And Fall of The Nazis: Up in Flames 1936-1940
programme.desc: Up in Flames 1936-1940: At the end of 1939, the German Army invades Poland. Examine how Hitler succeeded in pushing through his rearmament and war plans relatively unhindered.

programme.title: The Abyss: Rise And Fall of The Nazis: The Gates of Hell 1941-1942
programme.desc: The Gates of Hell 1941-1942: In the shadow of the war, the Nazi regime gradually advances its "final solution to the Jewish problem", culminating in the Holocaust.

programme.title: The Abyss: Rise And Fall of The Nazis: Genocide 1942-1944
programme.desc: Genocide 1942 - 1944: Along with Treblinka and Majdanek, Sobibor was one of the camps used in Operation Reinhard, in which the Nazis murdered almost two million people.

programme.title: The Abyss: Rise And Fall of The Nazis: Armageddon 1943-1945
programme.desc: Armageddon 1943-1945: The defeat at Stalingrad in 1943 was the turning point of the war and convinced the Nazi leadership to intensify their terror and propaganda campaigns.

programme.title: The Abyss: Rise And Fall of The Nazis: The Reckoning 1945-1948
programme.desc: The Reckoning 1945-1948: In 1945, WWII was over but the violence had not ended. The survivors want to blame the Germans. The reckoning with National Socialism is ambivalent.

programme.title: Inspector Gadget: Gadget In Winterland Aka Winter Olympics (The Pilot)
programme.desc: Watch Inspector Gadget every weeknight at 7/6c on Pluto TV. In the pilot episode, Inspector Gadget, Penny and Brain are headed for fun and relaxation in Winterland, site of the Olympic Games.

programme.title: Inspector Gadget: The Incredible Shrinking Gadget
programme.desc: Watch Inspector Gadget every weeknight at 7/6c on Pluto TV. Dr. Claw hires Dr. Shieskopf to invent a shrinking ray gun to shrink Inspector Gadget down to the size of a mouse.

programme.title: Inspector Gadget: Launch Time
programme.desc: Watch Inspector Gadget every weeknight at 7/6c on Pluto TV. M.A.D. agents sabotage a U.S. space shuttle by planting a bomb on board. Inspector Gadget foils M.A.D.'s plans and saves the space shuttle.

programme.title: Inspector Gadget: Gadget In Mini-Madness
programme.desc: Watch Inspector Gadget every weeknight at 7/6c on Pluto TV. Dr. Claw plots with Dr. Shieskopf to eliminate Gadget with his latest invention, the Linguinis, which are five little men with teeth sharp enough to chew up any material object.

programme.title: Inspector Gadget: Old Man Of The Mountain
programme.desc: Watch Inspector Gadget every weeknight at 7/6c on Pluto TV. The two oldest tribes in the Balkan Mountains are waging battle, endangering the entire area. M.A.D. is suspected of triggering the war. Inspector Gadget is on duty to investigate the crime.

programme.title: Inspector Gadget: Did You Myth Me?
programme.desc: Watch Inspector Gadget every weeknight at 7/6c on Pluto TV. Inspector Gadget and Penny prevent Daedalus and Dr. Claw from stealing the secret formula of King Croesus of turning lead into gold.

programme.title: Inspector Gadget: No Flies On Us
programme.desc: Watch Inspector Gadget every weeknight at 7/6c on Pluto TV. Inspector Gadget travels to Malaysia to find the famous explorers that were captured by Dr. Claw. Chief Quimby, Penny and Brain, infected with a deadly virus, are also captured.

programme.title: Inspector Gadget: Wambini Predicts
programme.desc: Watch Inspector Gadget every weeknight at 7/6c on Pluto TV. Chief Quimby warns Inspector Gadget of a MAD plot to steal the famous King of Alpacastan's llama that spits diamonds.

programme.title: Inspector Gadget: Gadget's Replacement
programme.desc: Watch Inspector Gadget every weeknight at 7/6c on Pluto TV. Inspector Gadget foils M.A.D.'s plants to tap into Chief Quimby's crimewave computer.

programme.title: Inspector Gadget: Quizmaster
programme.desc: Watch Inspector Gadget every weeknight at 7/6c on Pluto TV. Inspector Gadget protects armored cars full of money from the dangerous Dr. Claw.

programme.title: Arthur: Get Smart/Baby Steps
programme.desc: Everyone loves HUGO--the new interactive whiteboard that claims to be 100% accurate. If only Mr. Ratburn knew how to use it. Mei Lin can say "hello" AND play the piano?!? Kate can't even wave!

programme.title: Arthur: Desk Wars/Desperately Seeking Stanley
programme.desc: When Mr. Ratburn moves Brain and Arthur away from their usual desks, it sets off a chain reaction resulting in the most explosive desk war in third grade history! And, Arthur is 8-years old now—does he still need his teddy bear?

programme.title: Arthur: Buster's Breathless/The Fright Stuff
programme.desc: Will Buster's friends treat him the same after they learn he has asthma? Prankster have arrived in Elwood City--just in time for the "Scare Your Pants Off" costume party! It's boys vs. girls in what becomes a great big battle of the pranks.

programme.title: Arthur: D.W.'s Deer Friend/Buster Hits the Books
programme.desc: It’s time to celebrate summer! Join Arthur as he takes a family vacation and visits Grandpa Dave’s farm. Then, Arthur, D.W. and Buster spend a few days at the beach where they discover the simple joys of building sandcastles!

programme.title: Arthur: Fernkenstein's Monster/D.W., Dancing Queen
programme.desc: Inspired by Mary Shelley's "Frankenstein," Fern tells a tale so scary that Arthur and the gang become afraid of her! Then, Binky decides to teach D.W. to dance, but she just doesn't seem to get the moves. Is D.W. a no-talent klutz?

programme.title: Arthur: Mr. Ratburn's Secret Identity/Besties
programme.desc: Mysterious calls. Superhuman strength. Is Mr. Ratburn secretly a superhero? When Buster and Ladonna bond over a memorable trip to the movies, Arthur feels left out. Has Ladonna taken his place as Buster's best bud?

programme.title: Arthur: Arthur Makes A Movie/Go To Your Room!
programme.desc: Too young to see a real "James Hound" movie, the kids decide they'll make a film of their own. Next, how would YOU like to be four years old and completely misunderstood by your parents? And then be sent to your room for ten whole minutes?

programme.title: Arthur: Brain's Brain/Brain Sees Stars
programme.desc: Brain's Easter egg hunts are notoriously hard. But this year's might prove impossible if Brain can't remember where he hid the final egg. Then, crazy coincidences have prevented Brain from seeing a meteor shower in person.

programme.title: Arthur: No Acting Please/Prunella Deegan and the Disappointing Ending
programme.desc: When Fern lands a role in a community production, she fears she's not talented enough to be a star. Finally, the final volume of the Henry Screever series is out. Prunella and Marina compete to see who can finish the book the fastest.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: BJ learns that having a pet is a bigger responsibility than he expected when he takes care of a friend’s dog. When Baby Bop’s favorite teddy bear is torn, she wants to take him to the vet for help.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: A Perfectly Purple Day
programme.desc: When Sarah accidentally spills red paint into the blue paint, a mess turns into a perfectly purple day. The children paint pictures, make purple flowers and plan a purple party for their friend Colleen.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: Marcos accidentally breaks an Art Show project that Melanie has made. A Park Kid named Myra has decided she doesn't like her name.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: BJ and Riff find a pirate map, but in order to find the treasure, they have to be able to count. It’s time for a music concert in the park.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: Baby Bop meets a new girl named Jill who doesn’t want to join the fun.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: At Home in the Park
programme.desc: The children work together to make a bird house. They are happy to learn that the bird will have lots of company; many animals make their homes in the park too!

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: Baby Bop is surprised by the first day of cold weather, Barney helps her see that winter is a wonderful time. On a hot summer day, Barney teaches BJ about all the activities you can do in the summer.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Numbers! Numbers!
programme.desc: Tony shares a box full of numbers that he made with his dad. He is showing them off when a gust of wind blows them all away. Barney and the kids decide to go on a number hunt. They soon find Baby Bop and their hunt takes the group all over the park.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: It's Showtime!
programme.desc: Barney, BJ and the kids spend the day preparing for a performance for their friends in the park.

programme.title: Little Bear

programme.title: Little Bear

programme.title: Little Bear
programme.desc: Pompon wants to go on a treasure hunt with Siùsaidh in search of a fortune at the end of the rainbow. They both go off on an adventure but at the end of the day, he sees there are other things around which are just as precious.

programme.title: Little Bear

programme.title: Little Bear

programme.title: Little Bear

programme.title: Little Bear
programme.desc: Ants invade the Bear family's den. Pompon is happy to share his home, but draws the line at sharing his honey toast. Determined to solve the problem, he sets out to find an ideal new habitat for the intrusive little ants.

programme.title: Little Bear

programme.title: Little Bear

programme.title: Little Bear

programme.title: Little Bear

programme.title: Bob the Builder

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: Bob is installing a new pizza oven for Mr Sabatini, while Wendy lays a cycle lane in town. Mr Bentley has brought some Stop/Go signs to hold up the traffic while she works, but there is no-one to operate these with him – except Spud!

programme.title: Bob the Builder

programme.title: Bob the Builder

programme.title: Bob the Builder

programme.title: Bob the Builder

programme.title: Bob the Builder

programme.title: Bob the Builder

programme.title: Bob the Builder

programme.title: Bob the Builder

programme.title: Bob the Builder

programme.desc: Spring Watch presenters Michaela Strachan and Martin Hughes-Games head out in a 1964 MGB. They're joined by Mark Stacy and James Braxton, to help them through the antiques jungle and hostile territory--a world of scooters and Mod culture.

programme.title: Celebrity Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Robert Bathurst and Amanda Donohue team up with experts Philip Serrrell and David Harper. They take their classic cars on a ride through Norfolk and Lincolnshire, hunting for hidden treasure and learning the dark secret of Valentine's Day.

programme.title: Celebrity Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: TV presenter Janet Ellis and her pop-star daughter Sophie Ellis Bextor travel from Essex to Yorkshire with Philip Serrell and Will Axon. On the way, Janet hears about a long-lost soldier and Sophie pays homage to the humble honeybee.

programme.title: Celebrity Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Rosemary Shrager and Jean-Christophe Novelli hit the road in a classic Ford Mustang. Margie Cooper and Paul Laidlaw help the chefs sift through bargains in Yorkshire, but will a passion for cookery-themed items land the chefs in hot water?

programme.title: On the Oche

programme.title: Break of Throw: Overcoming Injury

programme.title: Inside the ADC: The Rise of Amateur Darts

programme.title: Should the World Championship Move Venue?
programme.desc: Henry Deacon and Paul Nicholson debate whether it's time for the World Championship to move to a new venue.

programme.title: Angry Ginge Vs The Bullseye Challenge

programme.title: The Story of Michael Smith
programme.desc: Henry Deacon and Matthew Edgar reflect on the story of Michael Smith discussing his career and achievements.

programme.title: Tungsten Talk
programme.desc: Jeff Smith joins Paul Nicholson to discuss his path into professional darts as a Canadian competitor.

programme.title: Tungsten Talk
programme.desc: Fallon Sherrock and Ted Evetts join Chris Murphy on Tungsten Talk to discuss their World Championship clash.

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries with Dennis Farina
programme.desc: This episode includes: Skull Duggery, Lucky School, Deadly Doses + UD, Drug Playboy, Eleven Million Dollar Heist + UD and Fallen Star.

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries with Dennis Farina
programme.desc: This episode includes: Texas Wife Murder, Falcon Lake UFO, Trucker Death, Lost Dutchman's Mine and Rider Down.

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries: Episode: 5
programme.desc: This episode includes: D.B. Cooper Pts 1 & 2, Update: Math Teacher Escape, Friends to the End & Update and Babe's Uniform & Update.

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries: Episode: 9
programme.desc: This episode includes: Canadian Crop Circles, Heads Up, Unlucky Thirteen & UD and Lone Lopez & UD.

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries with Dennis Farina
programme.desc: This episode includes: Huey Long Pts. 1 & 2, Not Home for the Holidays, Broken Hearts, Update: Thanks Lieutenant Stevens and Best Friend's Sister.

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries
programme.desc: This episode includes: Profiling the Paranormal, Casino Cowboy & UD, Missing on a Cruise and Police Woman Savior.

programme.title: Psychic Investigators: The Ladykillers
programme.desc: Rose Swartwood, an elderly woman living alone in a New York project, is stabbed to death late one night in a frenzied attack. For the next two years the case remains unsolved.

programme.title: Psychic Investigators: The Wrong Man
programme.desc: Memphis Police have a prime suspect in the gruesome killings of two prostitutes. But as they prepare to make an arrest, psychic Carol Pate pays the cops a visit.

programme.title: Are You Haunted..?: "Who's that?"
programme.desc: The team head to the East Midlands, to another overnight paranormal investigation. With reports of objects moving on their own, a cursed voodoo doll, and unexplained figures seen, will the team be able to shed any light on these mysterious incidents?

programme.title: Are You Haunted..?: "Is that you?"
programme.desc: This episode sees the 'Are You Haunted..?' team travel to the East Riding of Yorkshire area, where a venue steeped in history awaits investigation. Will the team encounter any sort of strange activity during their night here?

programme.title: Are You Haunted..?: "Can you not?"
programme.desc: Sara, Phil, and the rest of the AYH team head north, to Northumberland. Here they investigate a location that has for many years been the scene of supposed paranormal activity. And one of the team celebrates a landmark birthday. But who?

programme.title: Sensing Murder: Out of the Dark
programme.desc: Described as a brutal execution, 46-year-old grandmother Chattrice Maihi-Carroll was found naked, stabbed to death in her New Zealand home in 2008. There were multiple suspects and everything seemed resolved following the arrest of a neighbour.

programme.title: Sensing Murder: Lost Soul
programme.desc: In 1985, 25-year-old Luana 'La Verne' Williams disappeared from her Tauranga home. Eight years later her disappearance was upgraged to a murder enquiry. Her body has never been found.

programme.title: Sensing Murder: Looking for Justice
programme.desc: This week, for the first time ever, the prime suspect in a murder enquiry has turned to Sensing Murder for help.

programme.title: Sensing Murder: Into Thin Air
programme.desc: Jim Donnelly was a hard-working family man living a quiet life in suburban Auckland. For 20 years he’d worked as a scientist at the Glenbrook Steel Mill, south of Auckland. On the 21st of June 2004, he simply vanished into thin air.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters
programme.desc: Despite mysterious and unnerving warnings from locals, the Ghost Hunters face their fears and stay on mission: to help people confront terrifying paranormal encounters that have shaken them to their core.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters
programme.desc: Despite mysterious and unnerving warnings from locals, the Ghost Hunters face their fears and stay on mission: to help people confront terrifying paranormal encounters that have shaken them to their core.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters

programme.title: Ghost Hunters
programme.desc: Despite mysterious and unnerving warnings from locals, the Ghost Hunters face their fears and stay on mission: to help people confront terrifying paranormal encounters that have shaken them to their core.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Death Room
programme.desc: PRS arrives in Ryan's hometown to help the new owner of an old southern plantation unearth its dark history.?A painful family secret reveals a tale of greed and neglect, and the team must help free its unwilling victim from her spiritual prison.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Requiem
programme.desc: A young woman named Kristy has been haunted in her own bedroom since she can remember. Now it's up to Ryan and the crew to help Kristy before she's overwhelmed by the entity.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Paranormal Detour
programme.desc: With time off between cases, Ryan suggests to the PRS team they choose a random town to investigate. They roll into St. Helens, Oregon, home of Twilight, where they learn about the long history of the paranormal in the area.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Hide and Seek
programme.desc: Hillary and her nine-year-old son Hunter are being harassed by a shadow presence in their Victorian home in Newburgh, Indiana. Trap doors in the basement reveal artifacts from a bygone era, and the clients have recorded persistent strange noises.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Lady Vampire
programme.desc: PRS investigates a case involving single mom, Dawn, and her 5-year-old daughter, both of whom are tormented by the appearance of a hag they call "lady vampire."

programme.title: Paranormal State: School House Haunting
programme.desc: PRS travels to Massachusetts to investigate an old schoolhouse where children's voices disturb a couple who've made it their home.

programme.title: Paranormal State: The Ladder
programme.desc: A large family in Shrewsbury, MA, has been living with a spirit for the last 40 years. To most of the siblings, the entity is menacing and evil, but Sandy seems to have a different connection.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Haunted Ranch
programme.desc: PRS saddles up to a remote ranch in Hunt, Texas where black shadows are being spotted and animals harmed. What's more, a mysterious crop circle has formed on the property and the horses refuse to cross it.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Suicide Possession
programme.desc: Joan and her boyfriend Tony are seeing apparitions in their New Jersey home. Both are concerned that the spirits are influencing their behavior: a non-drinker, Tony has turned to the bottle while Joan has thoughts of harming herself.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Dwelling of the Dead
programme.desc: A single mom claims she is being physically assaulted by a spirit in her Kentucky home. Ryan first explores a natural explanation for the alleged phenomena. But the client's five-year-old son also sees spirits, and his sightings appear to line up.

programme.title: Most Haunted: Unseen: Gressenhall Workhouse Pt1
programme.desc: Karl investigates the very haunted school room in the large imposing Gressenhall Workhouse. The activity starts even before Karl gets into the building and becomes one of the most impressive investigations to date.

programme.title: Most Haunted: Unseen: Gressenhall Workhouse Pt2
programme.desc: Stuart investigates two buildings, a forge and the cottage. He could not have imagined the activity that unfolded around him.

programme.title: Most Haunted: Unseen: Bishton Hall P1
programme.desc: Stuart investigates the main house and seems to be pulled in different directions from an unexplained energy.

programme.title: Most Haunted: Unseen: Bishton Hall P2
programme.desc: Karl ventures down into the cellars of this large country house and soon comes under attack from an unseen force.

programme.title: Most Haunted: Royal Court Theatre - Bacup
programme.desc: The world famous ghost hunting team return for a new series and start in a small theatre with a big problem…ghosts.

programme.title: Most Haunted: Delapre Abbey
programme.desc: The team are joined by five members of the English rugby team as they investigate an all but forgotten piece of British history.

programme.title: Most Haunted: Drakelow Tunnels
programme.desc: p 8: Drakelow Tunnels - Kidderminster: With over 4 miles of haunted tunnels the team have one night to investigate this labyrinth of horror.

programme.desc: This episode features the following cases: Creepy Comics, Louie the Dip, The Wailing, The Landlady, Curse.

programme.title: A Haunting: Conjuring Evil
programme.desc: Harold and Cindy have found the perfect retreat in suburban Alaska for their family. But after their daughter begins to experiment in witchcraft, she unknowingly attracts the attention of a dark entity. Harold calls in experts to help reclaim the home.

programme.title: A Haunting: Wicked Eviction
programme.desc: Tammy Shea, a single mother of three, relocates her family for a fresh start but her dream turns to a nightmare when her family is antagonized by multiple entities. Desperate, Tammy finds a paranormal team who reveal the true evil in the home.

programme.title: A Haunting: Mother's Terror
programme.desc: When Jeanette's firefighter husband dies in the line of duty, she moves her daughters to a rustic hamlet in Long Island to start anew. Shortly after moving in, an evil entity lashes out at her daughter, Jeanette refuses to quit without a fight.

programme.title: A Haunting: Back From The Grave
programme.desc: Stay-at-home-mom Jamie enjoys taking walks with her children through her historic North Carolina neighborhood, until "something" dark and sinister follows them home. Jamie soon finds her son directly communicating with an entity from "beyond the grave."

programme.title: A Haunting: Sallie’s House
programme.desc: Deb and Tony’s son is born and his toys take on a life of their own.

programme.title: A Haunting: House of the Dead
programme.desc: Unseen intruders attack 10-year-old Billy Bean. He struggles to learn the secrets of the house.
